fire_brigade.name: Fire Brigade / Rescue 1122
fire_brigade.description: Primary fire response and local emergency search and rescue teams.

traffic_police.name: Traffic Police
traffic_police.description: Helps manage road diversions, route clearance, and vehicular safety.

ndma.name: NDMA / PDMA (Disaster Management)
ndma.description: Provincial and National Disaster Management Authorities for large-scale coordination.

edhi_foundation.name: Edhi Foundation Rescue
edhi_foundation.description: Immediate private ambulance backup and trauma transportation.

rescue_medical.name: Emergency Medical Services
rescue_medical.description: City-specific tertiary care public hospitals and trauma emergency departments.

water_board.name: WASA / Water & Sewerage Board
water_board.description: Manages urban drainage, water contamination, sewer blockages, and pipe bursts.

civil_defence.name: Civil Defence
civil_defence.description: Mobilizes volunteer services, crowd safety, and infrastructure monitoring teams.

city_admin.name: City Administration & Utilities
city_admin.description: Helpline for electric grid repairs and district coordinator's office.
